svg.title: Docker Compose Service Map
svg.desc: Shows each Docker service, its role, ports, and how it connects to the apps
svg.text: Zookeeper starts, Kafka waits (healthy), kafka-init runs, creates all topics
Postgres healthcheck: pg_isready Redis healthcheck: redis-cli ping
Kafka and Redis can be ephemeral in dev mode
Prevents typo topic names silently creating phantom topics. All 6 topics are explicit and owned.
